caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, a bowtie, and suspenders, sits in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall with a poster that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed graphic of a shield. On-screen text includes a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a red graphic that reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak and move slightly. In the final frame, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top, enters the frame from the right, appearing to interact with the man. The background remains consistent throughout the sequence, focusing on the podcasting equipment and studio decor.
